title: Python CRM API Integration and Automation
description: We need a Python developer to integrate our internal CRM with two third-party services (Salesforce and Mailchimp). Requirements: build robust REST API clients, implement OAuth2, set up scheduled sync jobs, and produce a small admin CLI for manual sync. Deliverables: documented Python module, unit tests (pytest), Postman collection, and a one-page runbook. Timeline: initial MVP in 1 week, stabilization in the following 1–2 weeks. Must have clear communication and provide daily progress notes. Tech stack: Python 3.10+, requests/httpx, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL. Nice to have: Docker, GitHub Actions CI. Client has payment verified, expects 10–15 hours/week for 3 weeks.

title: E-commerce Web Scraper (Price & Inventory) with CSV Export
description: Build a resilient web scraper for 8–10 e-commerce sites to capture product title, SKU, price, stock status, and last-updated timestamp daily. Requirements: anti-bot mitigation (rotating user agents, backoff), retries with exponential delay, and a scheduler to run nightly. Deliverables: Python (Playwright) or Node.js (Puppeteer) scraper, CSV export to S3, config-driven site definitions, and logging. Provide README and basic unit tests. Timeline: 2 weeks total. Clear milestones and regular demos are expected.

title: Data Cleaning and Transformation for Marketing Dataset
description: Looking for someone to clean and normalize a 120k-row marketing dataset (CSV + Excel). Tasks: deduplicate by email + phone, normalize addresses and country codes, standardize date formats, and split full names into first/last while preserving suffixes. Create reproducible scripts (Python + pandas preferred) and output final CSV plus a data quality report (before/after metrics). Deliverables within 7–10 days. Experience with data quality checks and edge cases is required.

title: Landing Page Redesign (Responsive HTML/CSS)
description: Redesign our product landing page using semantic, responsive HTML/CSS with light JavaScript for animations. We will provide Figma designs and copy. Requirements: mobile-first approach, accessibility (WCAG AA), SEO best practices (meta, schema basics), and fast load times (optimized assets). Deliverables: production-ready HTML/CSS/JS bundle and a brief handover doc. Includes one round of revisions after initial delivery. Target timeline: 1 week.

title: LLM-powered Chatbot Integration for Support Portal
description: Integrate an LLM-based chatbot into our SaaS support portal. Scope: connect OpenAI or compatible provider, implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) from our knowledge base, add context windows for conversation state, and expose an admin tool to update FAQs. Requirements: secure key management, latency under 2s for typical queries, and analytics on usage and fallback rate. Tech: Node.js or Python backend, React front end. Deliverables: working chatbot, deployment scripts, monitoring hooks, and documentation. Timeline: 3–4 weeks. Client is payment verified and prefers weekly milestones.
